tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent volatile on Mar 24: Asia session $96.50, recovering to $103 US session (Goodreturns.in, CNBC). Iran FM privately confirmed US mediator message is being reviewed — 15 points reportedly agreed (CBS News, Mar 24). Iran still publicly denies talks; IRGC attacked Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Mar 23. Pause expires Mar 28; if no progress, US escalation resumes. Working range $95-115 in stress; $160+ in tail (32%). PTTEP and Medco remain cleanest ASEAN equity beta; add on Asia-session dips. Hold conviction through Mar 28 absent confirmed ceasefire.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $96.50/$103 volatile Mar 24 (Asia/US sessions, Goodreturns.in/CNBC); ASEAN Energy Equities est. -3.4%. Iran FM privately confirmed US mediator message (CBS News, Mar 24) — first back-channel signal, raising base scenario to 18%. Iran still publicly denies; IRGC attacked Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Mar 23. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~169bp (-3bp). Trim energy-over-banks pair only if ceasefire formally acknowledged by Iran before Mar 28.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short — Dip Opportunity on Trump-Driven Rally
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP est. 60.30 (Mar 24, slight risk-on as back-channel diplomacy surfaces). Brent $96.50 Asia / $103 US session (Mar 24, CNBC); JKM $21.71/MMBtu — Philippines LNG import costs still at crisis levels. Iran FM privately confirmed US mediator message (CBS News) but publicly denies; IRGC struck Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Mar 23. PHP 60.30 is re-entry level; next stress target 61.50-62.50 if pause expires with no deal. Stop only if Iran formally acknowledges negotiations and Hormuz transit resumes.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short — Re-Entry on Trump Pause Dip
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR est. 17,050 on Mar 24 (slight risk-on from back-channel signal). Brent $96.50 Asia / $103 US (Mar 24) still elevated vs $70 ICP budget; ID 10Y est. 6.87%, Bank Indonesia constrained. Iran FM privately confirmed US mediator message (CBS News, Mar 24). Iran still publicly denies; IRGC struck Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Mar 23 (Al Jazeera). IDR 17,000-17,200 remains re-entry zone; stress target 18,000 if Mar 28 expires with no deal.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS Protection — Hold Through Mar 28
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG est. ~169bp (Mar 24, -3bp further tightening); ASEAN HY est. ~518bp (-7bp). Iran FM privately confirmed US mediator message (CBS News, Mar 24) — back-channel active. Iran still publicly denies; IRGC struck US Fifth Fleet Bahrain HQ and Prince Sultan airbase Mar 23 (Al Jazeera). Pause expires Mar 28; if US power plant strikes resume, 185-200bp is next iTraxx target. Hold CDS protection; reduce only on formal ceasefire acknowledgement.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF — Hold Through Mar 28 Deadline
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM $21.71/MMBtu (TradingView/NYMEX, Mar 24; essentially flat). TTF €59.34/MWh (OilpriceAPI, Mar 24; -3.5% from €61.50). Iran FM privately confirmed US mediator message (CBS News) but Qatar Ras Laffan restart remains suspended indefinitely — damage assessment not concluded. IMO reports ~2,000 vessels trapped in Persian Gulf (Mar 24). If Trump's Mar 28 deadline triggers US power plant strikes, JKM spikes above $23.40. Hold JKM-over-TTF long; add size if pause expires with no deal.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: CRITICAL: Sapura Energy's refinancing window remains closed. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~169bp; ASEAN HY est. ~518bp — unsecured market inaccessible. Brent $96.50 Asia session (Mar 24); Iran FM confirms mediator message but pause expires Mar 28. Activate secured bank lines, private credit, and DFI-backed structures before Mar 28. Every day of delay raises execution risk.

PTTEP should pre-fund before THB deteriorates further — TH 10Y est. 2.02%, USD/THB est. 33.05 (Mar 24). Brent $96.50 Asia session supports upstream EBITDA but JKM $21.71/MMBtu gas import costs remain elevated. Iran FM confirms mediator message; pause expires Mar 28; BOT easing probability near zero. Execute H2 2026 prefunding and sanctions/compliance review on Gulf JV exposure before Mar 28.

Expand USD revolving-credit capacity immediately. Brent $96.50 and JKM $21.71 still structurally elevated vs pre-shock; USD/SGD est. 1.2830. Iran FM mediator confirmation creates a narrow window — execute before Mar 28 while markets are slightly risk-on. IRGC attacks on Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Mar 23 confirm freight-route risk has not abated.

Hyflux must activate restructuring immediately. Base 18%, stress 50%, tail 32%; Brent $96.50; ASEAN HY est. ~518bp. JKM $21.71 still spikes gas-fired desalination costs. Iran FM mediator message narrows tail slightly but pause expires Mar 28 — if US strikes resume, tail scenario (oil $160+, LNG markets seized) becomes acute. Unsecured market closed; pursue private-credit and quasi-sovereign structures before Mar 28.
